items.briefing:
A critical flaw in Windows 11's sandbox feature has been discovered, allowing attackers to break out of the protected environment with a single click — ensure your Windows devices are fully updated. Separately, hackers were able to manipulate Meta AI into handing over access to high-profile Instagram accounts simply by asking it, highlighting real risks around AI-powered tools and social engineering.

If your organisation uses WordPress websites, be aware of an active malware campaign hiding malicious code inside Steam gaming profiles. **Practical tip:** Review who has admin access to your organisation's social media and website accounts, and enable multi-factor authentication on all of them today.

featured.title: Windows 11 sandbox flaw lets attackers escape with one click
featured.quote: Windows 11 sandbox bypass vulnerability could affect millions of Australian business users immediately.
